title: Protocol for DNA Extraction from Urine
author: A. Lenore Ackerman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wgsfbwe
materials: Enzyme buffer (0.5 M Tris, 1 mM EDTA, 0.2% 2-mercaptoethanol)

steps.title: Spin 30 ml for 15 minutes...
steps.instruction: Spin 30 ml for 15 minutes at 1500 X G at room temperature

steps.title: Pour off supernatant into a separate,...
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant into a separate, 50 ml tube and store at -80 c.Enzymatic Disruption

steps.title: Resuspend pellets in 500 uL Enzyme buffer (0
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellets in 500 uL Enzyme buffer (0.5 M Tris, 1 mM EDTA, 0.2% 2-mercaptoethanol, pH 7.5) in a 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube

steps.title: Add Enzymes
steps.instruction: Add Enzymes: 100 uL Lyticase (2000 U/ml) and 100 uL Lysozyme (100 mg/ml)

steps.title: Incubate at 30°C for 30 minutes, inverting every 5-10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 30°C for 30 minutes, inverting every 5-10 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4000 rcf for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4000 rcf for 5 minutes

steps.title: Remove supernatantMechanical Disruption
steps.instruction: Remove supernatantMechanical Disruption

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 800 uL Stool DNA stabilizer
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 800 uL Stool DNA stabilizer

steps.title: Add Beads
steps.instruction: Add Beads: 100 uL 0.1 mm beads and 300 uL 0.5 mm beads

steps.title: Bead beat on high for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Bead beat on high for 1 minute

steps.title: Spin briefly at 17,000 X G
steps.instruction: Spin briefly at 17,000 X G

steps.title: Bead beat on high for 1 minuteThermal Disruption
steps.instruction: Bead beat on high for 1 minuteThermal Disruption

steps.title: Heat at 95°C for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Heat at 95°C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Vortex for 5 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex for 5 seconds

steps.title: Heat at 95°C for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Heat at 95°C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Vortex for 5 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex for 5 seconds

steps.title: Cool on ice for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Cool on ice for 5 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minuteDNA Extraction
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minuteDNA Extraction

steps.title: For each sample, add 350 ml...
steps.instruction: For each sample, add 350 ml to each of 2 1.5 ml tubes

steps.title: Add 10 ul proteinase K mixture...
steps.instruction: Add 10 ul proteinase K mixture (Qiagen #1017738) to each sample

steps.title: Add 250 ul Buffer AL+Carrier [Poly...
steps.instruction: Add 250 ul Buffer AL+Carrier [Poly (A) Sigma-Aldrich #10108626001 10ng/ml] to each sample

steps.title: Vortex for 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex for 15 seconds

steps.title: Incubate at 70°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at 70°C for 10 minutes

steps.title: Add 250 uL 100% EtOH to each sample
steps.instruction: Add 250 uL 100% EtOH to each sample

steps.title: Mix by vortexing for 5 seconds
steps.instruction: Mix by vortexing for 5 seconds

steps.title: Transfer mixture from first tube to...
steps.instruction: Transfer mixture from first tube to QIAamp Mini Spin Column (#1011706) and centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute

steps.title: Change collection tube, transfer mixture from...
steps.instruction: Change collection tube, transfer mixture from second tube to spin column and centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute

steps.title: Change collection tube and add 500...
steps.instruction: Change collection tube and add 500 uL Buffer AW1 to column

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 1 minute

steps.title: Change collection tube and add 500 uL AW2 to column
steps.instruction: Change collection tube and add 500 uL AW2 to column

steps.title: Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 17,000 X G for 3 minutes

steps.title: Remove residual EtOH by centrifuging an...
steps.instruction: Remove residual EtOH by centrifuging an additional 1 min at max

steps.title: Transfer column to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer column to new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube

steps.title: Add 50 uL Buffer AE to...
steps.instruction: Add 50 uL Buffer AE to column, incubate at RT for 5 minutes and spin at 17,000 X G for 1 minute

steps.title: Transfer fluid from collection tube back...
steps.instruction: Transfer fluid from collection tube back to spin column and repeat last step

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop 2000 Spectrophotometer
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration on Nanodrop 2000 Spectrophotometer
